verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable core in sentence 1: "missing error handling and the lack of any authorization"; B says "a few real problems" before listing them.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to priority and blockers: "Authorization / IDOR (most serious)" and "auth check (#1) and the field allowlist (#2) are the ones I'd treat as blocking".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives a complete tightened route with `try`, `isValidId`, `canView`, `404`, and an explicit allowlist.
